markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Rhys Hoskins is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Rhys Hoskins starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Rhys Hoskins is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Rhys Hoskins is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.
